metadata.title: Payments
metadata.description: Review available balance, payout status, and payout history.

home.title: Payments
home.description: See your available balance, payouts, and the next step for this organization.

organization.title: Active organization
organization.label: Switch organization
organization.count: {count, plural, one {# organization available} other {# organizations available}}
organization.help: You’re viewing payments for this organization. Switch only if you need a different one.
organization.invalidDescription: The selected organization could not be loaded for your account. Choose another organization and retry.

nextStep.requestDescription: {organization} has money ready to pay out. Request the payout whenever you're ready.
nextStep.queueDescription: Review the active payout for {organization} first. If needed, you can line up the next one from here.
nextStep.idleDescription: {organization} does not have money ready for payout yet. Review recent activity while funds clear.
nextStep.secondaryDescription: Use payout history to review requests, open details, and keep up with status changes.

shell.loadingDescription: Getting balance and payout details ready for this organization.
shell.emptyDescription: Create or join an organization to manage payouts here.
shell.partialTitle: Some payment details are temporarily unavailable
shell.partialWalletDescription: Your balance and payout controls are temporarily unavailable. Recent payment activity is still shown below.
shell.partialQueueDescription: Your balance and payout controls loaded, but recent payment activity is temporarily unavailable.
shell.degradedDescription: We couldn't load the latest payments details. Try again to refresh.

wallet.title: Balance summary
wallet.description: Your balance, grouped by payment stage.

queue.title: Follow-up and next steps
queue.description: Recent payment activity that may need review or follow-up.
queue.actionNeededDescription: Items to review before the next payout can move forward.
queue.inProgressDescription: Items that are still moving and only need monitoring for now.
queue.emptyInProgress: Nothing is in progress right now.
queue.emptyDescription: Pauses, validations, and other important payment updates will appear here.
queue.moreItems: View {count, plural, one {# more update} other {# more updates}}
queue.actionNeededGuidance: Review this before requesting another payout.
queue.inProgressGuidance: Keep an eye on this while we finish processing it.
queue.genericDescription: There was a recent payment update for this organization.

payoutQueued.title: Your next payout is lined up
payoutQueued.description: We'll start it automatically when the current payout is no longer blocking it.

payoutRequested.title: Your payout request was received
payoutRequested.description: We created the request and started the payout process.

payoutProcessing.title: Your payout is being reviewed
payoutProcessing.description: We're validating the request and moving it through processing.

payoutPaused.title: Your payout is on hold
payoutPaused.description: The payout is being reviewed right now. If you need to do anything, you'll see it here.

payoutResumed.title: Your payout is moving again
payoutResumed.description: The review finished and the payout process continued.

payoutCompleted.title: Your payout was completed
payoutCompleted.description: The payout finished successfully and is now closed.

payoutFailed.title: Your payout couldn't be completed
payoutFailed.description: This payout needs follow-up before you request another one.

payoutAdjusted.title: Your payout amount changed
payoutAdjusted.description: The payout amount or status changed during review.

debtPauseRequired.title: Debt is blocking the next payout
debtPauseRequired.description: A balance rule paused the payout flow until the debt is reduced.

debtResumeAllowed.title: Debt no longer blocks payouts
debtResumeAllowed.description: The balance improved and the payout flow can continue.

disputeOpened.title: A payment dispute needs review
disputeOpened.description: A dispute may require evidence or follow-up before payouts can continue normally.

subscriptionRenewalFailed.title: Your subscription payment failed
subscriptionRenewalFailed.description: Update billing to avoid interruptions in your payment tools.

refundExecuted.title: A refund was completed
refundExecuted.description: A refund was applied and now appears in your financial history.

request.title: Request payout
request.description: Request a payout here. If one is already underway, you can line up the next one instead.
request.amountHint: Enter a whole-number amount, or leave it blank to request everything currently available.
request.submitHint: Submitting sends your payout request and starts the payout review.
request.queuedHint: If another payout is already moving, you can line up this one to go next.
request.successDescription: Your payout request is in. You can track it from the payout detail.
request.queueSuccessDescription: This request will start automatically after the current payout finishes.
request.conflictDescription: This organization already has a payout in progress. You can line up the next one to start after it finishes.

errors.invalidAmount: Enter a valid positive whole-number amount.
errors.submitFailed: We couldn't create the payout request right now.
errors.queueRequiresAmount: Enter a valid amount to line up the next payout.
errors.queueFailed: We couldn't line up the next payout right now.
errors.unknownAction: We couldn't complete this action. Please try again or contact support.
errors.notEligible: This organization does not have money ready for payout right now.
errors.amountExceedsAvailable: The amount entered is higher than what is currently available for payout.
errors.queueNotNeeded: A payout can be requested now, so there is no need to line up another one.
errors.queueAlreadyExists: There is already a payout lined up for this organization.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.description: Review past payouts and open one when you need more detail.
payouts.historyDescription: Track statuses, amounts, and dates without mixing payout history into the request form.
payouts.scopeHint: Newest payouts first. This view shows up to {pageSize} rows per page.
payouts.emptyDescription: Your first payout will appear here with its status and request date.

detail.title: Payout detail
detail.description: See the current status, timeline, and key amounts for this payout.
detail.summaryDescription: This summary shows the current status and the key amounts for this payout.
detail.stateTimelineDescription: Each update shows what changed and when it happened.
detail.noEvents: There are no payout updates yet for this request.
detail.notFoundDescription: The selected payout request could not be found for this organization.

reasonFamilies.processing: This payout is still being processed
reasonFamilies.genericReview: The payments team needs to review this payout

events.genericDescription: There was an update in this payout.

requested.title: The payout request was created
requested.description: We registered the payout and started its processing flow.

processing.title: The payout moved into processing
processing.description: We're validating the payout and reconciling the request.

paused.title: The payout was put on hold
paused.description: The payout is being reviewed. If you need to do anything, you'll see it here.

resumed.title: The payout resumed
resumed.description: The review finished and the payout continued.

completed.title: The payout completed
completed.description: The payout finished successfully and is now closed.

failed.title: The payout couldn't be completed
failed.description: The payout ended with an issue. Review it before requesting another payout.

adjusted.title: The payout amount changed
adjusted.description: The payout amount or payout settings changed during review.

statement.title: Payout statement
statement.description: When the payout finishes, you can review the final summary here. The support reference is only needed if our team asks for it.
statement.notFound: We don't have a statement for this payout yet.
statement.notTerminal: The statement will appear once this payout reaches a final state.
statement.error: We couldn't load the statement right now.
statement.summaryDescription: Use this summary to confirm the payout result without digging into internal references.
statement.adjustedSummary: The payout finished at {terminal} after being adjusted from {original}.
statement.fingerprintDescription: Keep this reference only if support asks for it. Most payout follow-up does not need it.
statement.copyError: The reference could not be copied.

eventContext.note: Payouts are managed at the organization level. This event shares the same balance and payout history.
eventContext.homeDescription: Review {organization}'s available balance, check the current payout, and request the next one without leaving this event.
eventContext.payoutsDescription: This event shares {organization}'s payout history. You're viewing the organization's payout activity here.
eventContext.payoutsHistoryDescription: Shared payout history for {organization}, so you can review statuses, amounts, and dates without leaving the event.
eventContext.detailDescription: This payout belongs to {organization}'s shared finance workflow.
eventContext.detailNotFoundDescription: We couldn't find this payout in the event organization's shared finance workflow.
